subtitle: Guided non-custodial Safenet staking
noValidatorsMatched: No validators match the current filters.
commissionTooltip: Fee retained by this validator from staking rewards.
validatorParticipationSummaryTooltip: Overview metric based on recent validator participation over the last 14 days.
participationTooltip: Recent validator participation rate over the last 14 days.
totalSafeStakedTooltip: Total SAFE currently delegated to this validator.
yourStakeTooltip: Your live SAFE stake on this validator after connecting a wallet.
managedSafeHint: Safecafe can discover Safe accounts where the connected wallet is an owner. Choose one from the list or enter a Safe contract address manually. Owner wallets can execute threshold-1 Safe transactions directly; higher-threshold Safes are exported for Safe review.
invalidSafeAccount: Choose or enter a valid Safe address that is different from the connected wallet.
safeSubjectExportOnly: This staking account is a Safe. Export the Safe payload and execute it from Safe.
safeOwnerRequired: The connected wallet is not an owner of this Safe.
safeMultisigThresholdExport: This Safe needs multiple owner confirmations. Create a Safe proposal so other owners can confirm it.
safeProposalWaiting: Waiting for additional Safe owner confirmations.
safeMultisigFlowNoticeBody: This plan has {count} Safe transactions. Safecafe will create, confirm, and execute them one at a time. After the current Safe transaction has enough owner confirmations and is executed, continue the flow to prepare the next one.
simulationExplainer: Safecafe checks live balances, network, allowance, queues, and proofs before asking for a signature.
simulationPartial: Approval simulated; final stake is checked after approval confirms.
rewardsProofRequired: Claim requires a valid reward proof
noWallet: No injected wallet found. Use CLI or open with a browser wallet.
liveDataRefreshingCached: Refreshing on-chain data. Showing last read result.
liveDataRefreshFailedCached: Refresh failed. Showing last read result.
insufficientSafeBalance: SAFE balance is insufficient for this stake amount.
insufficientValidatorStake: Your stake on this validator is insufficient.
noProof: No claimable reward proof for this account.
connectWalletHint: Safecafe will read your live SAFE balance, staking positions, withdrawals, allowance, and reward proof.
connectToBegin: Connect a wallet to load live Ethereum mainnet data.
withdrawalsPageDescription: Track withdrawal queues and claim unlocked SAFE.
rewardsPageDescription: Claim rewards, inspect proof status, and restake when ready.
validatorsPageDescription: Compare validator stake, participation, commission, and your positions.
settingsPageDescription: Verify contracts, release integrity, and operating assumptions.
connectToLoad: Connect a wallet before refreshing live account data.
connectToPlan: Connect a wallet and load live data before continuing.
connectToExport: Connect a wallet and load live data before exporting.
readinessDescription: Wallet, chain, balance, allowance, reward proof, and withdrawal queue are checked before sending.
networkDescription: Safecafe currently supports Ethereum mainnet for Safenet staking. Connect a wallet to switch networks automatically.
copyFailed: Copy failed. Your browser blocked clipboard access.
footerTagline: A calmer way to stake SAFE. Still fully non-custodial.
warningApprovalNeeded: This action needs approval before staking unless your wallet supports batching.
warningWithdrawalQueue: Withdrawals enter the protocol queue and become claimable after the delay.
warningClaimFifo: The staking contract claims withdrawals in FIFO order.
docsNonCustodialValue: Every transaction is signed by the user wallet or Safe.
docsCliParityValue: The CLI uses the same transaction core as the web app.
docsReleaseManifestValue: Contract addresses, build hash, and CID will ship with releases.
agentGreeting: Tell me what you want to do with your SAFE staking position. I will prepare reviewable actions before any wallet confirmation.
agentDisconnectedTitle: Connect a wallet to start chatting
agentDisconnectedBody: Staking Agent needs your staking account context before it can give useful guidance and actions.
agentDisconnectedCanExplore: After connecting, it can prepare actions from live SAFE balance, staking positions, and reward state.
agentDisconnectedUnlocks: Supports stake, unstake, claim, restake, and move-stake workflows.
agentDisconnectedSafety: Nothing can be submitted without your wallet confirmation.
agentPreviewWithoutWallet: Connect a wallet before chatting with Staking Agent.
agentClarifyWithoutWallet: Connect a wallet before chatting with Staking Agent.
agentConnectToChat: Connect a wallet to chat with Agent
agentPlaceholder: Ask: claim rewards and restake them
agentStopConfirmBody: The current response and any running tool checks will be interrupted. You can start a new message afterward.
agentActionNotReady: Review the action card first. I can open the wallet once the checks are ready.
agentConfirmWarningsRequired: Review and accept the warnings in the action card before opening your wallet.
agentTransactionInProgress: Another wallet action is already in progress. Wait for it to finish before opening this Agent action.
agentPlanReady: Pre-flight checks passed. Review the action card below, then open your wallet.
agentPlanDrafted: Action prepared. Some steps need a later refresh before execution.
agentPlanSimulationFailed: The pre-flight check failed. Review the message in the action card before trying again.
agentContextChanged: Wallet context changed. I cleared the pending Agent action.
agentAccessRequired: Live Agent service requires a one-time read/simulation sign-in and a SAFE balance or existing SAFE staking position.
agentAuthRequired: Sign in with your wallet to allow read-only checks and transaction simulation for this staking account.
agentAuthFailed: Wallet sign-in failed. Read-only checks and simulation were not unlocked.
agentAuthReadyBody: Wallet sign-in is active and this staking account has SAFE or an existing SAFE staking position.
agentAuthSignBody: Sign once with your wallet to unlock live Agent guidance and server-side simulation for this staking account.
agentAuthNoAccessBody: This staking account needs a SAFE balance or an existing SAFE staking position before live Agent chat is enabled.
agentAuthNoWalletBody: Connect a wallet so Staking Agent can read the staking account and prepare actions.
agentAuthLiveDataBody: Load live staking data before unlocking Staking Agent.
agentAuthDisabledBody: Agent auth is disabled by configuration. Wallet confirmations are still required for transactions.
agentServiceUnavailable: Agent service is unavailable. Local transaction checks are still available.
agentAuthSessionRequired: Sign in with the connected wallet before using Staking Agent.
agentAuthMismatch: The signed wallet session does not match the current wallet or selected Safe. Sign in again.
agentAccessDeniedNoSafe: This account does not currently have a SAFE balance or an existing SAFE staking position.
agentInvalidContext: Staking Agent needs a valid connected wallet and staking account before it can continue.
agentDailyLimitExceeded: This wallet has reached today's Staking Agent limit. Try again after {resetAt}.
agentToolRefreshLiveData: Refreshing live SAFE balance and stake
agentNoRewardsCanStake: There are no claimable staking rewards right now. This account has SAFE available, so you can stake directly instead. Tell me the amount and validator when you want to stake.
agentWalletConfirmations: Your wallet will ask you to confirm each transaction in order.
agentClarifyStakeValidator: Which validator should receive this stake?
agentClarifyRestakeValidator: Which validator should receive the restaked rewards?
agentClarifyStake: Which amount and validator should be staked?
agentClarifyUnstake: Which amount and validator should be unstaked?
agentClarifyRebalance: Which amount and validators should be used for the rebalance?
agentClarifyGeneral: Which supported staking action should I prepare?
agentStalePlan: Live account data changed. Refresh and prepare the action again before using it.
agentAcknowledgeWarnings: I reviewed the warnings and transaction order.
agentWalletRequired: Connect wallet and load live data before preparing an executable Agent action.
agentReviewReminder: Nothing will be submitted until you confirm in your wallet.
agentLiveDataRequired: Load live staking data before preparing an executable Agent action.
agentRewardProofRequired: No claimable reward proof is available.
agentAccountChanged: Connected account changed. Prepare the Agent action again before using it.
agentDelayedPhaseRisk: This step can only be prepared again after live data changes.
agentValidatorSelectedBest: Selected the best active validator by participation, commission, and stake.
safeDiscoveryLoading: Looking up Safes owned by this wallet...
safeDiscoveryReady: Choose a discovered Safe or enter another Safe manually.
safeDiscoveryEmpty: No Safe was discovered for this wallet. You can enter a Safe contract address manually.
safeDiscoveryFailed: Could not load Safes for this wallet. You can enter a Safe contract address manually.
apyFootnote: Estimated from the SEP-55 4.5M SAFE / 6-month reward subsidy and current TVL. Actual rewards vary by validator participation, commission, and reward rules.
trustVerificationSubtitle: Verify the network, contracts, and frontend before signing.
trustVerifiedNotice: This release record points to a clean IPFS CID. Verify the same CID through ENS or another gateway before signing.
trustEnsVerifiedNotice: The ENS contenthash on Ethereum mainnet matches the current IPFS release CID.
trustEnsResolvedNotice: The ENS contenthash resolves to this IPFS CID. The bundled manifest is available, but no external release record was available for a full comparison.
trustDirtyBuildNotice: The latest recorded IPFS build was produced from a dirty worktree. Treat it as a review record until a clean release is published.
trustEnsMismatchNotice: The ENS contenthash on Ethereum mainnet does not match this recorded release CID yet.
trustEnsMissingNotice: The ENS name does not currently expose a contenthash on Ethereum mainnet.
trustEnsUnsupportedNotice: The ENS contenthash resolved on Ethereum mainnet is not an IPFS contenthash.
trustEnsCheckFailedNotice: Safecafe could not verify the ENS contenthash against Ethereum mainnet right now.
trustSourceMirror: You may be viewing a hosted mirror; verify against ENS/IPFS
trustContenthashDetail: The mutable ENS pointer should resolve to this immutable CID.
trustContenthashMatches: Read from the ENS resolver on Ethereum mainnet and matched to the current IPFS CID.
trustContenthashResolved: Read from the ENS resolver on Ethereum mainnet. Full release-record comparison is not available on this static mirror.
trustContenthashMismatch: Read from the ENS resolver on Ethereum mainnet, but it points to a different CID.
trustContenthashMissing: The ENS resolver returned no contenthash for this name.
trustContenthashUnsupported: The ENS resolver returned a non-IPFS contenthash.
trustContenthashCheckFailed: Unable to read the ENS contenthash from Ethereum mainnet right now.
trustContenthashUnchecked: No release CID was available to compare against the onchain ENS record.
trustManifestDetail: Included inside the IPFS directory with build inputs and file hashes.
trustFootnote: A page badge is a guide, not blind trust. For high-value actions, compare the ENS contenthash, CID, release manifest, and GitHub release from independent sources.
auditStatusValue: Verify release notes before large deposits
customRpcDescription: If you prefer not to use Safecafe's authenticated RPC gateway, configure your own Ethereum Mainnet RPC. After verification, on-chain RPC reads, pre-flight simulation, receipt polling, and ENS checks prefer your RPC. Validator metadata, reward proofs, prices, and Safe discovery may still use Safecafe read APIs or public sources.
customRpcNotConfigured: No custom RPC is configured. Safecafe's default RPC strategy is used.
customRpcInvalidUrl: Enter a valid https RPC URL. Plain http is allowed only for localhost development.
customRpcWrongChain: This RPC is not Ethereum Mainnet.
customRpcFailed: RPC verification failed. Check the URL or node permissions.
userSafeApiDescription: Use your own Safe API key for multisig proposal and confirmation sync. If configured, multisig flows do not depend on Safecafe's server-side Safe key.
userSafeApiNotConfigured: No user Safe API key is configured. Multisig proposal sync uses Safecafe's server-side key when available.
userSafeApiActive: Safe API key is configured and will be checked by the next Safe request.
userSafeApiKeyRequired: Enter a Safe API key, or keep the saved key.
userSafeApiUnauthorized: Safe API key is invalid or not allowed.
userSafeApiRateLimited: Safe API key is rate limited. Try again later.
userSafeApiVerifyFailed: Safe API verification failed. Check the key and browser CORS permissions.
userSafeApiKeySaved: Saved; leave blank to keep it
userSafeApiSecurityNote: Your Safe API key is stored in this browser's local storage and is used only for Safe Transaction Service requests.
safeApiKeyMissing: This deployment has not configured a Safe API key. Add your own Safe API key in Settings, or try again later.
safeApiKeyInvalid: Safe API key is invalid or not allowed. Update your Safe API key in Settings, or try again later.
safeTxServiceRateLimited: Safe Transaction Service is rate limited. Try again later or use your own Safe API key in Settings.
safeTxServiceFailed: Safe Transaction Service is unavailable. Try again later or use your own Safe API key in Settings.
userLlmDescription: If the deployer did not configure Agent LLM, or you prefer not to use the deployer's model service, configure your own OpenAI-compatible API.
userLlmNotConfigured: No custom LLM is configured. Safecafe Agent service is used by default.
userLlmHttpsRequired: Use an https API Base. Plain http is allowed only for localhost development.
userLlmKeyRequired: Enter an API Key, or keep the saved key.
userLlmFailed: LLM configuration is invalid. Check it and try again.
userLlmVerifyFailed: LLM verification failed. Check the endpoint, model, API key, and browser CORS permissions.
userLlmKeySaved: Saved; leave blank to keep it
userLlmSecurityNote: Your API key is stored in this browser's local storage, and Agent messages plus staking context are sent directly to that provider.
userLlmAgentReadyBody: Agent will connect directly to your configured LLM provider. On-chain transactions still require wallet confirmation.
walletConfirmationHint: No transaction is submitted until your wallet signs it.
executionInterruptedBody: You cancelled the current wallet step. Completed steps stay applied.
executionReviewBody: Review the current chain state, then continue with the remaining steps.
restakePreview: Rewards will be staked to the selected validator after claim.
noPendingWithdrawalRows: No pending withdrawal rows loaded for this account.
planningModeHint: You can plan the amount and validator before connecting.
positionsHistoryHint: Detailed staking and transaction history will appear here in a later release.
positionsHistoryEmpty: No active validator position is loaded for this account.
batchActionsHint: Claim all, restake, and batch withdrawals are planned for advanced users.
